name: Introduction to Computer Science
description: A comprehensive quiz covering basic computer science concepts including programming, data structures, and algorithms.
instructions: Please read each question carefully. You have 45 minutes to complete this exam. Make sure to answer all questions before submitting.

questions.question: What is the time complexity of binary search?
questions.explanation: Binary search divides the search space in half with each iteration, resulting in O(log n) time complexity.

questions.question: Which of the following are valid Python data types?
questions.explanation: Python has list, dict, and tuple as built-in data types. Array is available through the array module but not a built-in type.

questionSets.title: True or False (Weighted Scoring)
questionSets.context: Read the following statements about programming concepts and determine if they are true or false.

questions.question: A stack follows the FIFO (First In First Out) principle.
questions.explanation: A stack follows LIFO (Last In First Out), not FIFO. FIFO is used by queues.

questions.question: In object-oriented programming, inheritance allows a class to inherit properties from another class.
questions.explanation: Inheritance is a fundamental OOP concept that allows code reuse by inheriting properties and methods from parent classes.

questions.question: JavaScript is a compiled language.
questions.explanation: JavaScript is an interpreted language, though modern engines use JIT (Just-In-Time) compilation.

questions.question: RAM is a type of permanent storage.
questions.explanation: RAM is volatile memory that loses data when power is off. Permanent storage includes HDDs and SSDs.

questions.question: What is 2^10 (2 to the power of 10)?
What is the value of π (pi) to 2 decimal places?
